global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on a promotional message and call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a simple and secure signup process for ClearLedger.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Circular shape
elements.description: A gray circular shape positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Rectangular shape
elements.description: A gray rectangular shape positioned in the center of the ad, overlapping with the circular shape.

elements.label: Background shape
elements.description: A large gray background shape that fills the center area of the ad.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Secure & simple Fast signup, instant card' positioned at the bottom center of the ad.
elements.text_content: Secure & simple Fast signup, instant card

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The text 'ClearLedger' in a prominent font located at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom center of the ad with the text 'Get offer' in white.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the text 'SALE' positioned at the top right corner of the ad.
